text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mm-mm! I'm telling ya, these taiyaki are<n>the best!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Y'know the famous taiyaki shop in the<n>shopping
district? They give them to me<n>for free so I can
keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
A-and, well... they're so good that I go<n>back for
more... Now I've put on a few<n>pounds...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I'll lose the weight with a bit of<n>running! And
the nice people in the<n>shopping district will be
happy to see<n>me run too! So for now... I'm gonna
dig<n>right in! ♪
